title: user login with valid credentials
description: Test the /auth/login endpoint to verify that users can successfully log in with valid email and password, and receive a valid JWT token.

title: user registration with new email
description: Test the /auth/register endpoint to ensure new users can register with a unique email and password, and receive confirmation of successful registration.

title: generate business analysis with valid input
description: Test the /analysis/generate endpoint to verify that the system generates accurate AI-powered business analysis reports for given ventureId, module, tool, description, and language.

title: create new venture with valid data
description: Test the /ventures POST endpoint to ensure users can create a new venture by providing valid name and description, and the venture is persisted correctly.

title: get venture details by id
description: Test the /ventures/{id} GET endpoint to verify that the system returns correct venture details for a given venture ID.

title: get analysis history for venture
description: Test the /analysis/{ventureId} GET endpoint to ensure users can retrieve the historical analysis records associated with a specific venture.

title: update user profile information
description: Test the /users/profile PUT endpoint to verify that users can update their profile information and preferences, and changes are reflected in the system.

title: create subscription with valid payment
description: Test the /subscriptions POST endpoint to ensure users can create a subscription with valid payment details and the subscription status is updated accordingly.

title: invite team member with valid details
description: Test the /teams/invite POST endpoint to verify that team owners can invite members by providing ventureId, email, and role, and invitations are sent with correct access rights.

title: export analysis in requested format
description: Test the /export POST endpoint to ensure users can export analysis results by providing analysisId and format, and the exported document matches the requested format without data loss.
